accommodations.text: Read test directions and math word problems aloud on request.
accommodations.source_quote: read test directions and math word problems aloud

accommodations.text: Provide a word bank for written-response items in reading and history.
accommodations.source_quote: provide a word bank for written-response items

accommodations.text: Seat near the point of instruction and away from high-traffic areas.
accommodations.source_quote: preferential seating near the point of instruction

accommodations.text: Pair new vocabulary with visuals and definitions.
accommodations.source_quote: pair new vocabulary with visuals and definitions

accommodations.text: Accept typed responses in place of extended handwriting.
accommodations.source_quote: accept typed responses in place of extended handwriting

services.source_quote: Specialized academic instruction reading 30 minutes 5 times weekly
Speech and language therapy social communication 30 minutes weekly

goals.text: Noah will sustain attention to an independent task for 10 minutes in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Sustains attention for 3 minutes in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: sustain attention to an independent task for 10 minutes

goals.text: Diego will write a paragraph with a clear topic sentence and three details in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Writes a paragraph with a topic sentence in 1 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: write a paragraph with a clear topic sentence and three details

goals.text: Given a grade-level passage, Aanya will decode multisyllabic words with 85% accuracy on 4 of 5 probes.
Sofia will retell a short narrative with a beginning, middle, and end in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Retells a narrative with only a beginning in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: retell a short narrative with a beginning, middle, and end

goals.text: Priya will follow two-step spoken directions in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Follows two-step directions in 2 of 5 opportunities.
